CREATE TABLE pem_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, pem_data TEXT);
INSERT INTO pem_test (id, pem_data) VALUES (1, '-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\nMIID...\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----');

INSERT INTO pem_test (id, pem_data) VALUES (2, '-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
MIIE...
-----END CERTIFICATE-----
-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
MIIF...
-----END CERTIFICATE-----');

INSERT INTO pem_test (id, pem_data) VALUES (3, 'NonCertificateData
-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
MIIF...
-----END CERTIFICATE-----');

INSERT INTO pem_test (id, pem_data) VALUES (4, '-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
MIID...
-----END CERTIFICATE-----
SomeOtherData');

INSERT INTO pem_test (id, pem_data) VALUES (5, '-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
MIIE...
-----END CERTIFICATE-----
-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
MIGF...
-----END CERTIFICATE-----');
SELECT pem_certificates_to_array(pem_data) FROM pem_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT pem_certificates_to_array(pem_data) FROM pem_test WHERE id = 2;
SELECT pem_certificates_to_array(pem_data) FROM pem_test WHERE id = 3;
SELECT pem_certificates_to_array(pem_data) FROM pem_test WHERE id = 4;
SELECT pem_certificates_to_array(pem_data) FROM pem_test WHERE id = 5;
SELECT id, pem_certificates_to_array(pem_data) AS certificates FROM pem_test WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3);
SELECT id, pem_certificates_to_array(pem_data) FROM pem_test WHERE pem_data LIKE '%-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----%';
SELECT id FROM pem_test WHERE pem_certificates_to_array(pem_data) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pem_test WHERE pem_certificates_to_array(pem_data) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, pem_certificates_to_array(pem_data) FROM (SELECT id, pem_data FROM pem_test WHERE id < 4) AS subquery;
